svg.title: Analytics Agent · Progressive Disclosure
svg.text: Ask in plain language → the agent walks a markdown data-dictionary tree layer-by-layer (read_doc), writes SQL, and streams each step back over SSE · Claude Agent SDK on Amazon Bedrock

① Browser → ② CloudFront → ③ EC2 (FastAPI + Agent SDK) ⇄ Bedrock · read_doc walks the knowledge tree (progressive disclosure) · run_sql / call_metric hit PostgreSQL · present_result streams via SSE · dashed = request in-flight
